---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---

---
title: "Compare Timeseries of Network Stats Across Port Groups and to Other ESR Indicators"
format: html
---

```{r}
## --- Setup & Directories ---
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(PNWColors)
library(viridis)
```


```{r}
indir <- 'results/statistics'
pngdir <- 'results/figures'
other_indir <- 'data/input'
```


# Define metadata for files
```{r}
file_meta <- list(
  nodes = list(
    file = "VesselLevelNodeStats_2004_2025_21pcgroups_totalrev7873.43337267464_indivrev787.343337267464_connectivity_rmCrab_10pContribution_2026-01-15.csv",
    metrics = c(node_strength = "Node Strength", eigen = "Importance")
  ),
  network = list(
    file = "VesselLevelNetworkStats_2004_2025_21pcgroups_totalrev7873.43337267464_indivrev787.343337267464_connectivity_rmCrab_10pContribution_2026-01-15.csv",
    metrics = c(ed = "edge density", N = "number of fisheries")
  )
)

myfisheries <- c('Salmon', 'Non-DTS groundfish', 'DTS groundfish')
```

## --- Efficient Data Ingestion ---

```{r}
# Load Node Stats
dat_long <- read_csv(here(indir, file_meta$nodes$file)) %>%
  select(pcgroup, year, metier.cm, all_of(names(file_meta$nodes$metrics))) %>%
  filter(metier.cm %in% myfisheries) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(names(file_meta$nodes$metrics)), names_to = "metric", values_to = "value") %>%
  mutate(metric = recode(metric, !!!file_meta$nodes$metrics))

# Load Network Stats
dat2_long <- read_csv(here(indir, file_meta$network$file)) %>%
  select(pcgroup, y, all_of(names(file_meta$network$metrics))) %>%
  rename(year = y) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(names(file_meta$network$metrics)), names_to = "metric", values_to = "value") %>%
  mutate(metric = recode(metric, !!!file_meta$network$metrics))
```

```{r}
# ESR Export Preparation
dat_esr <- bind_rows(
  dat_long %>% mutate(metric = paste(metier.cm, metric)),
  dat2_long
) %>%
  filter(!pcgroup %in% c("Other Coastal Washington", "Unknown Ports", "Columbia River")) %>%
  rename(index = value, timeseries = pcgroup)

write_csv(dat_esr, here(indir, paste0('FPN_metrics_FY2026_', Sys.Date(), ".csv")))
```

```{r}
## --- Streamlined Plotting Function ---

# Define a single function to handle the repeated ggplot logic
plot_network_ts <- function(data, title_prefix, y_lab, filename, use_viridis = FALSE) {
  p <- ggplot(data, aes(x = year, y = value, color = pcgroup)) +
    geom_point(size = 2) + 
    geom_line() +
    facet_wrap(~pcgroup, labeller = label_wrap_gen(16)) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(min(data$year), max(data$year), by = 4)) +
    labs(title = paste(title_prefix, "2004-2025"), x = "Year", y = y_lab) +
    theme_bw() + 
    theme(legend.position = "none", axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5))

  if(use_viridis) {
    p <- p + scale_color_viridis_d()
  } else {
    p <- p + scale_color_manual(values = pnw_palette("Starfish", length(unique(data$pcgroup))))
  }
  
  ggsave(here(pngdir, paste0(filename, ".png")), plot = p, width = 8.5, height = 7.5, dpi = 200)
  return(p)
}

## --- Generate Plots ---

# Node Strength for Salmon
plot_network_ts(
  data = filter(dat_long, metric == "Node Strength", metier.cm == "Salmon"),
  title_prefix = "Node Strength of Salmon in FPN",
  y_lab = "Node Strength",
  filename = "Node_Strength_Salmon"
)

# Edge Density (Global Network Metric)
plot_network_ts(
  data = filter(dat2_long, metric == "edge density"),
  title_prefix = "Edge Density in FPN",
  y_lab = "Edge Density",
  filename = "Edge_Density_Time_Series",
  use_viridis = TRUE
)
```
